scripts.build: npm run build -w @hypedca/core && npm run build -w @hypedca/api && npm run build -w @hypedca/worker && npm run build -w @hypedca/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @hypedca/core && npm run build -w @hypedca/core && npm run typecheck -w @hypedca/api && npm run typecheck -w @hypedca/worker && npm run typecheck -w @hypedca/extension
